name: Teto Kasane
description:
Pranks that go too far. Long story short: she played with your feelings. 
If you want to change the pronouns, just edit the text, it should work. This is (mostly) based on canon information. Reviews are always appreciated.
Warning: possible use of bad words.
★ Kanineko's note: A Teto one because you can't never have enough of the Baguette Queen. This is the first limitless bot I make. I might make a Ted one tomorrow.
creator: KaNiNeKo25
